summary: Parent Word Bank Creation Feature - All Tests Passed. Backend: 7/7 API tests passed. Frontend: Admin feature flag toggle works correctly, Parent 'Create Word Bank' button appears/hides based on flag status.

issues: 404 errors for some static resources (likely favicon) - non-critical

critical_code_review_comments: Feature flag implementation is correct - GET /api/feature-flags/parent-wordbank returns correct status
Admin can toggle parent_wordbank_creation_enabled in Features tab
Guardian wordbank creation correctly blocked (403) when flag disabled
Guardian wordbank creation succeeds (200) when flag enabled
Admin can always create word banks regardless of flag status
Frontend MarketplaceTab correctly shows/hides 'Create Word Bank' button based on flag
Word bank creation form has all required fields: name, category, description, specialty, baseline_words, target_words, stretch_words
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Parent_WB_* word banks during testing (cleanup handled by test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parent Word Bank Creation feature is fully functional. Flag is currently ENABLED. The feature allows parents to create word banks when admin enables 'Parent Word Bank Creation' in Admin Portal > Features tab. API endpoint /api/feature-flags/parent-wordbank returns flag status.

frontend_ui_tests: Admin login and navigate to Features tab - PASSED
Parent Word Bank Creation toggle visible in Features tab - PASSED
Toggle can be enabled/disabled and saved - PASSED
Parent login with flag ENABLED - Create Word Bank button visible - PASSED
Create Word Bank form opens with all fields - PASSED
Parent login with flag DISABLED - Create Word Bank button NOT visible - PASSED
